description: You are a geometry professor preparing an interactive GeoGebra applet demonstrating the Simson Line theorem. Construct a triangle with vertices A(0, 0), B(6, 0), and C(2, 5), its circumcircle, and a moveable point P constrained to that circumcircle. Create the Simson Line by finding the perpendicular projections from P onto the triangle's sides and constructing the line through those foot points. Include a text annotation mentioning 'Simson Line' and save the construction to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/simson_line.ggb
